---
title: "Workers-comp"
author: "Zian Wang"
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
# Library packages
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DescTools)
library(evd)
library(car)
library(extRemes)
library(evir)
```
```{r}
# Import data
freq <- read_excel("srcsc-2026-claims-workers-comp.xlsx", sheet = 1)
sev <- read_excel("srcsc-2026-claims-workers-comp.xlsx", sheet = 2)
macro <- read_excel("srcsc-2026-interest-and-inflation.xlsx", skip = 2)
```
```{r}
# Frequency
summary(freq)
```
```{r}
# Absolute value
freq <- freq %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), abs))
summary(freq)
```
# NA
```{r}
# Total NA
sum(rowSums(is.na(freq)) > 0)
mean(rowSums(is.na(freq)) > 0)
```
```{r}
# Variabel NA
colMeans(is.na(freq))
```
```{r}
colSums(is.na(freq))
```
```{r}
# Remove NA
freq <- na.omit(freq)
```
# Character Variables
```{r}
# solar_system
freq$solar_system <- sub("_.*", "", freq$solar_system)
table(freq$solar_system)
```
```{r}
# station_id
freq$station_id <- sub("_.*", "", freq$station_id)
table(freq$station_id)
```
```{r}
# occupation
freq$occupation <- sub("_.*", "", freq$occupation)
table(freq$occupation)
```
```{r}
# employment_type
freq$employment_type <- sub("_.*", "", freq$employment_type)
table(freq$employment_type)
```
```{r}
# Numeric Variables
freqc <- subset(freq, experience_yrs >= 0.2 & experience_yrs <= 40)
freqc <- freqc[freqc$accident_history_flag %in% c(0,1), ]
freqc <- freqc[freqc$psych_stress_index %in% c(1,2,3,4,5), ]
freqc <- freqc[freqc$hours_per_week %in% c(20,25,30,35,40), ]
freqc <- subset(freqc, supervision_level >= 0 & supervision_level <= 1)
freqc <- subset(freqc, gravity_level >= 0.75 & gravity_level <= 1.5)
freqc <- freqc[freqc$safety_training_index %in% c(1,2,3,4,5), ]
freqc <- freqc[freqc$protective_gear_quality %in% c(1,2,3,4,5), ]
freqc <- subset(freqc, base_salary >= 20000 & base_salary <= 130000)
freqc <- subset(freqc, exposure >= 0 & exposure <= 1)
freqc <- subset(freqc, claim_count >= 0 & claim_count <= 2)

freqc <- freqc %>%
  mutate(across(c(accident_history_flag, psych_stress_index, hours_per_week,
                  safety_training_index, protective_gear_quality), as.factor))

summary(freqc)
```
```{r}
table(freqc$solar_system)
```
```{r}
# Average frequency
sum(freqc$claim_count)/sum(freqc$exposure)
```
# Solar System
```{r}
# Group
freqs <- freqc %>%
  group_by(solar_system) %>%
  summarise(
    total_claims = sum(claim_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_exposure = sum(exposure, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  # Calculate average frequency
  mutate(frequency = total_claims / total_exposure)

# Order
freqs$solar_system <- factor(freqs$solar_system,
                             levels = freqs$solar_system[order(freqs$frequency, decreasing = TRUE)])

# Plot
ggplot(freqs, aes(x = solar_system, y = frequency)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(frequency, 4)),
            vjust = -0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Average Claim Frequency by Solar System",
       x = "Solar System",
       y = "Average Claim Frequency (Claims per Unit Exposure)")
```
# Occupation
```{r}
# Group
freqo <- freqc %>%
  group_by(occupation) %>%
  summarise(
    total_claims = sum(claim_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_exposure = sum(exposure, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  # Calculate average frequency
  mutate(frequency = total_claims / total_exposure)

# Order
freqo$occupation <- factor(freqo$occupation,
                             levels = freqo$occupation[order(freqo$frequency, decreasing = TRUE)])

# Plot
ggplot(freqo, aes(x = occupation, y = frequency)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(frequency, 4)),
            vjust = -0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Average Claim Frequency by Occupation",
       x = "Occupation",
       y = "Average Claim Frequency (Claims per Unit Exposure)")
```
```{r}
# Distribution
ggplot(freqc, aes(x = claim_count)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(
    stat = "count",
    aes(label = after_stat(count)),
    vjust = -0.3
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Claim Count Distribution",
    x = "Number of Claims",
    y = "Number of Policies"
  )
```
```{r}
# Mean and Variance
mean(freqc$claim_count)
var(freqc$claim_count)
```
# Modeling: Poisson
```{r}
# Full model
freq_pois <- glm(claim_count ~ solar_system + station_id + occupation + employment_type + experience_yrs + accident_history_flag + psych_stress_index + hours_per_week + supervision_level + gravity_level + safety_training_index + protective_gear_quality + base_salary + offset(log(exposure)),
                  family = poisson(),
                  data = freqc)
summary(freq_pois)
```
```{r}
deviance(freq_pois) / df.residual(freq_pois)
```
```{r}
# Selection
freq_pois_i1 <- glm(claim_count ~ occupation + accident_history_flag + psych_stress_index + safety_training_index + offset(log(exposure)),
                  family = poisson(),
                  data = freqc)
summary(freq_pois_i1)
```
```{r}
plot(freq_pois_i1)
```


```{r}
deviance(freq_pois_i1) / df.residual(freq_pois_i1)
```
```{r}
# Predict
freqc$predicted_freq <- predict(freq_pois_i1, type = "response")
mean(freqc$predicted_freq)
mean(freqc$claim_count)
```
```{r}
# Plot
plot(freqc$predicted_freq, freqc$claim_count)
```
```{r}
# Gini
Gini(freqc$predicted_freq, freqc$claim_count)
```
```{r}
# Predict
lambda <- sum(freqc$predicted_freq)
lambda
```
```{r}
# Severity
summary(sev)
```
```{r}
# Absolute Value
sev <- sev %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), abs))
summary(sev)
```
# NA
```{r}
# Total NA
sum(rowSums(is.na(sev)) > 0)
mean(rowSums(is.na(sev)) > 0)
```
```{r}
# Variable NA
colMeans(is.na(sev))
```
```{r}
colSums(is.na(sev))
```
```{r}
lapply(sev, function(x) which(is.na(x)))
```
```{r}
# claim_id
sev[c(447, 448, 449, 1795, 1796, 1797, 1904, 1905, 1906),]
```
```{r}
# policy_id
sev[c(1593, 1594, 1595),]
```
```{r}
# Fill
sev[448, "claim_id"] <- "C-0000448"
sev[1796, "claim_id"] <- "C-0001796"
sev[1905, "claim_id"] <- "C-0001905"
sev[1594, "policy_id"] <- "WC-EPS-00960"

colSums(is.na(sev))
```
```{r}
# Remove NA
sev <- na.omit(sev)
```
# Character Variables
```{r}
# solar_system
table(sev$solar_system)
```
```{r}
# station_id
sev$station_id <- sub("_.*", "", sev$station_id)
table(sev$station_id)
```
```{r}
# occupation
sev$occupation <- sub("_.*", "", sev$occupation)
table(sev$occupation)
```
```{r}
# employment_type
sev$employment_type <- sub("_.*", "", sev$employment_type)
table(sev$employment_type)
```
```{r}
# injury_type
sev$injury_type <- sub("_.*", "", sev$injury_type)
table(sev$injury_type)
```
```{r}
# injury_cause
sev$injury_cause <- sub("_.*", "", sev$injury_cause)
table(sev$injury_cause)
```
```{r}
# Numeric Variables
sevc <- subset(sev, claim_seq >= 1 & claim_seq <= 2)
sevc <- subset(sevc, experience_yrs >= 0.2 & experience_yrs <= 40)
sevc <- sevc[sevc$accident_history_flag %in% c(0,1), ]
sevc <- sevc[sevc$psych_stress_index %in% c(1,2,3,4,5), ]
sevc <- sevc[sevc$hours_per_week %in% c(20,25,30,35,40), ]
sevc <- subset(sevc, supervision_level >= 0 & supervision_level <= 1)
sevc <- subset(sevc, gravity_level >= 0.75 & gravity_level <= 1.5)
sevc <- sevc[sevc$safety_training_index %in% c(1,2,3,4,5), ]
sevc <- sevc[sevc$protective_gear_quality %in% c(1,2,3,4,5), ]
sevc <- subset(sevc, base_salary >= 20000 & base_salary <= 130000)
sevc <- subset(sevc, exposure >= 0 & exposure <= 1)
sevc <- subset(sevc, claim_length >= 3 & claim_length <= 1000)
sevc <- subset(sevc, claim_amount >= 5)

sevc <- sevc %>%
  mutate(across(c(claim_seq, accident_history_flag, psych_stress_index, hours_per_week, safety_training_index, protective_gear_quality), as.factor))

summary(sevc)
```
# Solar System
```{r}
# Group
sevs <- sevc %>%
  group_by(solar_system) %>%
  summarise(
    severity = mean(claim_amount, na.rm = TRUE))

# Order
sevs$solar_system <- factor(sevs$solar_system,
                             levels = sevs$solar_system[order(sevs$severity, decreasing = TRUE)])

# Plot
ggplot(sevs, aes(x = solar_system, y = severity)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Claim Severity by Solar System",
    x = "Solar System",
    y = "Average Severity (Claim Amount per Claim)"
  )
```
# Occupation
```{r}
# Group
sevo <- sevc %>%
  group_by(occupation) %>%
  summarise(
    severity = mean(claim_amount, na.rm = TRUE))

# Order
sevo$occupation <- factor(sevo$occupation,
                             levels = sevo$occupation[order(sevo$severity, decreasing = TRUE)])
# Plot
ggplot(sevo, aes(x = occupation, y = severity)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Claim Severity by Occupation",
    x = "Occupation",
    y = "Average Severity (Claim Amount per Claim)"
  )
```
# Injury Type
```{r}
# Group
sev_it <- sevc %>%
  group_by(injury_type) %>%
  summarise(
    severity = mean(claim_amount, na.rm = TRUE))

# Order
sev_it$injury_type <- factor(sev_it$injury_type,
                             levels = sev_it$injury_type[order(sev_it$severity, decreasing = TRUE)])
# Plot
ggplot(sev_it, aes(x = injury_type, y = severity)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Claim Severity by Injury Type",
    x = "Injury Type",
    y = "Average Severity (Claim Amount per Claim)"
  )
```
# Injury Cause
```{r}
# Group
sev_ic <- sevc %>%
  group_by(injury_cause) %>%
  summarise(
    severity = mean(claim_amount, na.rm = TRUE))

# Order
sev_ic$injury_cause <- factor(sev_ic$injury_cause,
                             levels = sev_ic$injury_cause[order(sev_ic$severity, decreasing = TRUE)])
# Plot
ggplot(sev_ic, aes(x = injury_cause, y = severity)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Claim Severity by Injury Cause",
    x = "Injury Cause",
    y = "Average Severity (Claim Amount per Claim)"
  )
```
```{r}
# Occupation / Injury type
tab <- table(sevc$occupation, sevc$injury_type)

df_tab <- as.data.frame(tab)
names(df_tab) <- c("Occupation", "Injury", "Count")

ggplot(df_tab, aes(x = Occupation, y = Injury, fill = Count)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Occupation vs Injury Type Heatmap")
```
```{r}
# Claim length / Claim amount
ggplot(sev, aes(x = claim_length, y = claim_amount)) +
  geom_point(color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red") +  
  labs(title = "Base Salary vs Claim Amount")
```
```{r}
# Claim length
ggplot(sevc, aes(x = claim_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Claim Length Distribution",
    x = "Claim Length",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
```{r}
# Distribution
ggplot(sevc, aes(x = log(claim_amount))) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Log Claim Amount Distribution",
    x = "Log(Claim Amount)",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
```{r}
# Mean and Variance
mean(sevc$claim_amount)
var(sevc$claim_amount)
```
# Modeling: Gamma
```{r}
# Full model
sev_gamma <- glm(claim_amount ~ solar_system + station_id + occupation + employment_type + experience_yrs + accident_history_flag + psych_stress_index + hours_per_week + supervision_level + gravity_level + safety_training_index + protective_gear_quality + base_salary + injury_type +
injury_cause + claim_length,
                  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                  data = sevc)
summary(sev_gamma)
```
```{r}
# Selection
sev_gamma_i1 <- glm(claim_amount ~ psych_stress_index + safety_training_index + protective_gear_quality + base_salary + injury_cause + claim_length,
                  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                  data = sevc)
summary(sev_gamma_i1)
```
```{r}
plot(sev_gamma_i1)
```
```{r}
summary(sev_gamma_i1)$dispersion
```
```{r}
pred_gamma <- predict(sev_gamma_i1, type = "response")
MAE_gamma  <- mean(abs(sevc$claim_amount - pred_gamma))
MAE_gamma
RMSE_gamma <- sqrt(mean((sevc$claim_amount - pred_gamma)^2))
RMSE_gamma
```
```{r}
plot(sevc$claim_amount, pred_gamma)
abline(0,1,col="red")
```
```{r}
# Selection v2
sev_gamma_i2 <- glm(claim_amount ~ solar_system + station_id + occupation + employment_type + experience_yrs + accident_history_flag + psych_stress_index + hours_per_week + supervision_level + gravity_level + safety_training_index + protective_gear_quality + base_salary,
                  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                  data = sevc)
summary(sev_gamma_i2)
```
```{r}
plot(sev_gamma_i2)
```
```{r}
# Selection v3
sev_gamma_i3 <- glm(claim_amount ~ solar_system + station_id + employment_type  + psych_stress_index + supervision_level + gravity_level + safety_training_index + base_salary,
                  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
                  data = sevc)
summary(sev_gamma_i3)
```
```{r}
plot(sev_gamma_i3)
```
```{r}
# Plot mean excess
meplot(sevc$claim_amount)
```
```{r}
# 1. Calculte expected value
sevc$expected_val <- predict(sev_gamma_i3, type = "response")

# 2. calculate Pearson residual：(Actual - Expected) / Expected
sevc$pearson_res <- (sevc$claim_amount - sevc$expected_val) / sevc$expected_val

# 3. Plot mean excess
meplot(sevc$pearson_res, main = "Mean Excess Plot of Pearson Residuals")

# 4. Examine residuals
quantile(sevc$pearson_res, c(0.9, 0.95, 0.99))
```
```{r}
# 1. Set residual threshold
res_u <- 2
extreme_res <- sevc$pearson_res[sevc$pearson_res > res_u]

# 2. Fit GPD to residuals
fit_res_gpd <- fevd(extreme_res, threshold = res_u, type = "GP")
sigma_res <- fit_res_gpd$results$par[[1]]
xi_res <- fit_res_gpd$results$par[[2]]

# 3. Calculate the probability of residual beyond threshold
p_tail_res <- length(extreme_res) / nrow(sevc)
p_tail_res
```
```{r}
plot(fit_res_gpd)
```
```{r}
# Parameters
phi <- summary(sev_gamma_i3)$dispersion
exposure <- nrow(freqc)
freqc$base_sev <- predict(sev_gamma_i3, newdata = freqc, type = "response")
base_sev <- sum(freqc$base_sev * freqc$exposure) / sum(freqc$exposure)
```
# Short term
```{r}
# Original aggregate loss
exposure*mean(sevc$claim_amount)*sum(freqc$claim_count)/sum(freqc$exposure)
```
```{r}
# Simulate short term loss function
simulate_loss <- function(lambda, base_sev, n_sim = 10000) {
  results <- replicate(n_sim, {
    # 1. Simulate annually claim counts (Poisson)
    n_claims <- rpois(1, lambda)
    
    if (n_claims == 0) return(agg_loss = 0)
    
    # 2. Simulate severity for every claim
    individual_claims <- sapply(1:n_claims, function(x) {
      base_val <- rgamma(1, shape = 1/phi, scale = phi * base_sev)
      
      if (runif(1) < p_tail_res) {
        extra_res <- revd(1, loc = res_u, scale = sigma_res, shape = xi_res, type = "GP")
        return(base_val * (1 + max(extra_res, res_u)))
      } else {
        return(base_val)
      }
    })
    
    # 3. Calculate the aggregate loss
    return(sum(individual_claims))
  })
}
```
```{r}
# Simulate
set.seed(2175)
ST_losses <- simulate_loss(lambda, base_sev, n_sim = 100000)
```
```{r}
# Total loss
ST_loss_mean <- mean(ST_losses)
ST_loss_sd <- sd(ST_losses)
ST_loss_var <- var(ST_losses)
ST_loss_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses, 0.95)
ST_loss_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses, 0.99)
ST_loss_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses[ST_losses > quantile(ST_losses, 0.99)])

ST_loss <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_mean,
    ST_loss_sd,
    ST_loss_var,
    ST_loss_var95,
    ST_loss_var99,
    ST_loss_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss)
```
```{r}
# Average loss
ST_loss_avg_mean <- mean(ST_losses)/exposure
ST_loss_avg_sd <- sd(ST_losses)/sqrt(exposure)
ST_loss_avg_var <- var(ST_losses)/exposure
ST_loss_avg_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses, 0.95)/exposure
ST_loss_avg_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses, 0.99)/exposure
ST_loss_avg_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses[ST_losses > quantile(ST_losses, 0.99)])/exposure

ST_loss_avg <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_avg_mean,
    ST_loss_avg_sd,
    ST_loss_avg_var,
    ST_loss_avg_var95,
    ST_loss_avg_var99,
    ST_loss_avg_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss_avg)
```
# Returns
```{r}
# Total premium
risk_load_percent <- 0.1
risk_load <- (ST_loss_var95 - ST_loss_mean) * risk_load_percent
expense_load <- ST_loss_mean * 0.20
profit_margin <- 0.05
total_premium <- (ST_loss_mean + risk_load + expense_load) / (1 - profit_margin)
total_premium <- as.numeric(total_premium)
round(total_premium, 2)
```
```{r}
# Average premium
avg_premium <- total_premium/exposure
round(avg_premium, 2)
```
```{r}
# Pure Premium
# Calculate GPD Tail Factor
# E[GPD_excess] = sigma / (1 - xi)
expected_excess_res <- sigma_res / (1 - xi_res)
tail_adjustment <- (1 - p_tail_res) + p_tail_res * (1 + res_u + expected_excess_res)

# Individual expected loss
freqc$expected_loss <- freqc$predicted_freq * freqc$base_sev * tail_adjustment

# Gross Premium
loading <- 0.20
freqc$premium <- freqc$expected_loss / (1 - loading)

# Rate Card
rate_card <- aggregate(premium ~ solar_system + occupation, 
                       data = freqc, 
                       FUN = mean)

# Format
rate_card$premium <- round(rate_card$premium, 2)
print(rate_card)
```
```{r}
# Average premium of solar systems
sys_premium <- aggregate(premium ~ solar_system, 
                       data = freqc, 
                       FUN = sum)
sys_premium
```
```{r}
# Average premium of occupations
occ_premium <- aggregate(premium ~ occupation, 
                       data = freqc, 
                       FUN = mean)
occ_premium
```
```{r}
# Distribution
ggplot(freqc, aes(x = premium)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Premium Distribution",
    x = "Premium",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
# Net Revenue
```{r}
# Total revenue
ST_revenue <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    total_premium - ST_loss_mean,
    ST_loss_sd,
    ST_loss_var,
    total_premium - ST_loss_var95,
    total_premium - ST_loss_var99,
    total_premium - ST_loss_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue)
```
```{r}
# Average revenue
ST_revenue_avg <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    avg_premium - ST_loss_avg_mean,
    ST_loss_avg_sd,
    ST_loss_avg_var,
    avg_premium - ST_loss_avg_var95,
    avg_premium - ST_loss_avg_var99,
    avg_premium - ST_loss_avg_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue_avg)
```
# Interest and inflation
```{r}
# Mean
base_inflation <- mean(macro$Inflation)
base_interest1 <- mean(macro$"1-Year Risk Free Annual Spot Rate")
base_interest10 <- mean(macro$"10-Year Risk Free Annual Spot Rate")

# SD
sd_inflation <- sd(macro$Inflation)
sd_interest1 <- sd(macro$"1-Year Risk Free Annual Spot Rate")
sd_interest10 <- sd(macro$"10-Year Risk Free Annual Spot Rate")
```
# Long term
```{r}
# Simulate long term function
simulate_long_term_path <- function(lambda, base_sev, base_premium, n_years = 10, n_sim_long = 1000) {
  results <- replicate(n_sim_long, {
    total_pv_cost <- 0
    total_pv_premium <- 0
    
    for (t in 1:n_years) {
      # 1. Simulate total annual loss
      annual_loss <- sum(simulate_loss(lambda, base_sev, n_sim = 1))
      
      # 2. Interest and inflation (normally distributed)
      annual_inflation <- rnorm(1, mean = base_inflation, sd = sd_inflation)
      annual_interest <- rnorm(1, mean = base_interest1, sd = sd_interest1)
      
      # 3. Calculate PV
      pv_factor <- (1 + annual_inflation)^t / (1 + base_interest1)^t
      total_pv_cost <- total_pv_cost + (annual_loss * pv_factor)
      total_pv_premium <- total_pv_premium + (base_premium * pv_factor)
    }
    
    return(c(pv_cost = total_pv_cost, pv_premium = total_pv_premium))
  })
  
  return(as.data.frame(t(results)))
}
```
```{r}
# Simulate
set.seed(2175)
LT <- simulate_long_term_path(lambda, base_sev, total_premium, n_years = 10, n_sim_long = 10000)
```
```{r}
# Loss
LT_loss_mean <- mean(LT$pv_cost)
LT_loss_sd <- sd(LT$pv_cost)
LT_loss_var <- var(LT$pv_cost)
LT_loss_var95 <- quantile(LT$pv_cost, 0.95)
LT_loss_var99 <- quantile(LT$pv_cost, 0.99)
LT_loss_tvar99 <- mean(LT$pv_cost[LT$pv_cost > quantile(LT$pv_cost, 0.99)])

LT_loss <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    LT_loss_mean,
    LT_loss_sd,
    LT_loss_var,
    LT_loss_var95,
    LT_loss_var99,
    LT_loss_tvar99
    )
)

print(LT_loss)
```
```{r}
# Returns
LT_premium_mean <- mean(LT$pv_premium)
LT_premium_sd <- sd(LT$pv_premium)
LT_premium_var <- var(LT$pv_premium)
LT_premium_var95 <- quantile(LT$pv_premium, 0.05)
LT_premium_var99 <- quantile(LT$pv_premium, 0.01)
LT_premium_tvar99 <- mean(LT$pv_premium[LT$pv_premium < quantile(LT$pv_premium, 0.01)])

LT_premium <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Returns (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    LT_premium_mean,
    LT_premium_sd,
    LT_premium_var,
    LT_premium_var95,
    LT_premium_var99,
    LT_premium_tvar99
    )
)

print(LT_premium)
```
```{r}
# Net Revenue
LT_revenue <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    LT_premium_mean - LT_loss_mean,
    sd(LT$pv_premium - LT$pv_cost),
    var(LT$pv_premium - LT$pv_cost),
    LT_premium_var95 - LT_loss_var95,
    LT_premium_var99 - LT_loss_var99,
    LT_premium_tvar99 - LT_loss_tvar99
    )
)

print(LT_revenue)
```
# Scenario testing
# Best scenario
```{r}
# Simulate short term loss: best scenario
set.seed(2175)
ST_losses_b <- simulate_loss(lambda*0.9, base_sev*0.95, n_sim = 100000)
```
```{r}
# Total loss: best scenario
ST_loss_b_mean <- mean(ST_losses_b)
ST_loss_b_sd <- sd(ST_losses_b)
ST_loss_b_var <- var(ST_losses_b)
ST_loss_b_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses_b, 0.95)
ST_loss_b_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses_b, 0.99)
ST_loss_b_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses_b[ST_losses_b > quantile(ST_losses_b, 0.99)])

ST_loss_b <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_b_mean,
    ST_loss_b_sd,
    ST_loss_b_var,
    ST_loss_b_var95,
    ST_loss_b_var99,
    ST_loss_b_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss_b)
```
```{r}
# Total revenue: best scenario
ST_revenue_b <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    total_premium - ST_loss_b_mean,
    ST_loss_b_sd,
    ST_loss_b_var,
    total_premium - ST_loss_b_var95,
    total_premium - ST_loss_b_var99,
    total_premium - ST_loss_b_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue_b)
```
# Worst scenario
```{r}
# Simulate short term loss: worst scenario
set.seed(2175)
ST_losses_w <- simulate_loss(lambda*1.2, base_sev*1.3, n_sim = 100000)
```
```{r}
# Total loss: worst scenario
ST_loss_w_mean <- mean(ST_losses_w)
ST_loss_w_sd <- sd(ST_losses_w)
ST_loss_w_var <- var(ST_losses_w)
ST_loss_w_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses_w, 0.95)
ST_loss_w_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses_w, 0.99)
ST_loss_w_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses_w[ST_losses_w > quantile(ST_losses_w, 0.99)])

ST_loss_w <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_w_mean,
    ST_loss_w_sd,
    ST_loss_w_var,
    ST_loss_w_var95,
    ST_loss_w_var99,
    ST_loss_w_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss_w)
```
```{r}
# Total revenue: worst scenario
ST_revenue_w <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    total_premium - ST_loss_w_mean,
    ST_loss_w_sd,
    ST_loss_w_var,
    total_premium - ST_loss_w_var95,
    total_premium - ST_loss_w_var99,
    total_premium - ST_loss_w_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue_w)
```
# Stress testing
# Extreme frequency
```{r}
# Simulate short term loss: extreme frequency
set.seed(2175)
ST_losses_f <- simulate_loss(lambda*1.5, base_sev, n_sim = 100000)
```
```{r}
# Total loss: extreme frequency
ST_loss_f_mean <- mean(ST_losses_f)
ST_loss_f_sd <- sd(ST_losses_f)
ST_loss_f_var <- var(ST_losses_f)
ST_loss_f_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses_f, 0.95)
ST_loss_f_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses_f, 0.99)
ST_loss_f_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses_f[ST_losses_f > quantile(ST_losses_f, 0.99)])

ST_loss_f <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_f_mean,
    ST_loss_f_sd,
    ST_loss_f_var,
    ST_loss_f_var95,
    ST_loss_f_var99,
    ST_loss_f_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss_f)
```
```{r}
# Total revenue: extreme frequency
ST_revenue_f <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    total_premium - ST_loss_f_mean,
    ST_loss_f_sd,
    ST_loss_f_var,
    total_premium - ST_loss_f_var95,
    total_premium - ST_loss_f_var99,
    total_premium - ST_loss_f_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue_f)
```
# Extreme severity
```{r}
# Simulate short term loss: extreme severity
set.seed(2175)
ST_losses_s <- simulate_loss(lambda, base_sev*1.8, n_sim = 100000)
```
```{r}
# Total loss: extreme severity
ST_loss_s_mean <- mean(ST_losses_s)
ST_loss_s_sd <- sd(ST_losses_s)
ST_loss_s_var <- var(ST_losses_s)
ST_loss_s_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses_s, 0.95)
ST_loss_s_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses_s, 0.99)
ST_loss_s_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses_s[ST_losses_s > quantile(ST_losses_s, 0.99)])

ST_loss_s <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_s_mean,
    ST_loss_s_sd,
    ST_loss_s_var,
    ST_loss_s_var95,
    ST_loss_s_var99,
    ST_loss_s_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss_s)
```
```{r}
# Total revenue: extreme severity
ST_revenue_s <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    total_premium - ST_loss_s_mean,
    ST_loss_s_sd,
    ST_loss_s_var,
    total_premium - ST_loss_s_var95,
    total_premium - ST_loss_s_var99,
    total_premium - ST_loss_s_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue_s)
```
# Catastrophe
```{r}
# Simulate short term loss: catastrophe
set.seed(2175)
ST_losses_c <- simulate_loss(lambda*1.5, base_sev*1.8, n_sim = 100000)
```
```{r}
# Total loss: catastrophe
ST_loss_c_mean <- mean(ST_losses_c)
ST_loss_c_sd <- sd(ST_losses_c)
ST_loss_c_var <- var(ST_losses_c)
ST_loss_c_var95 <- quantile(ST_losses_c, 0.95)
ST_loss_c_var99 <- quantile(ST_losses_c, 0.99)
ST_loss_c_tvar99 <- mean(ST_losses_c[ST_losses_c > quantile(ST_losses_c, 0.99)])

ST_loss_c <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Loss (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    ST_loss_c_mean,
    ST_loss_c_sd,
    ST_loss_c_var,
    ST_loss_c_var95,
    ST_loss_c_var99,
    ST_loss_c_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_loss_c)
```
```{r}
# Total revenue: extreme frequency
ST_revenue_c <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Expected Total Revenue (Mean)", "Standard Deviation", "Variance", "95% VaR", "99% VaR", "99% TVaR"),
  Value = c(
    total_premium - ST_loss_c_mean,
    ST_loss_c_sd,
    ST_loss_c_var,
    total_premium - ST_loss_c_var95,
    total_premium - ST_loss_c_var99,
    total_premium - ST_loss_c_tvar99
    )
)

print(ST_revenue_c)
```
